markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[GrowthX intro call for Clear Street's new retail product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Clear Street's Goal:** Launch "Clear Street Active" (Q2 2026) to target active traders (\>$50k accounts) with content focused on its core strength as a short-selling broker.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Offer:** An end-to-end content partner using AI workflows and expert oversight (ex-TechCrunch EIC, HashiCorp CMO) to publish 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Engagement Model:** A two-phase process: a strategy sprint with 10–20 articles, followed by an ongoing retainer. Clear Street can opt out after the sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Mahmoud will connect GrowthX with the Clear Street marketing team for a follow-up call and platform demo.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)

## Topics

### Clear Street's Retail Strategy

  - [**New Product:** "Clear Street Active," launching in early Q2 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Target Audience:** Active traders with large accounts (\>$50k–$200k+).](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
      - [**Key Personas:** Day traders, short sellers, algo traders.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [**Positioning:** Leverage the company's reputation as a top US short-selling broker (via its CenterPoint legacy) while expanding into new markets.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [**Competitive Landscape:** Robinhood, Interactive Brokers.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [**Opportunity:** A "blank slate" for content strategy, as the current site is outdated and focused on institutional clients.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=748.0)

### GrowthX's Content Partnership Model

  - [**End-to-End Service:** Strategy, roadmap, and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [**Content Engine:** AI-driven workflows with expert oversight.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [**Leadership:** CEO built organic engines at HashiCorp, ScaleAI, and DeepGram; CCO is the former Editor-in-Chief of TechCrunch.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [**Output:** 5 articles per week, with flexibility to scale.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [**Success Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
      - **Primary:** Increase search & AI visibility (e.g., Augment Code grew from \<1% to 20–25% in 6 months).
      - [**Secondary:** Drive high-intent traffic and track conversions via a Looker dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

### Engagement Process & Pricing

  - [**Onboarding:** Initial collaboration is required to define the content engine.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Clear Street Provides:** Personas, brand guides, product info.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**GrowthX Creates:** Internal artifacts to guide AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Ongoing:** Clear Street's role shifts to reviewing and approving drafts.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [**Pricing:**](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** Fixed fee for strategy + 10–20 published articles.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Ongoing):** Retainer for 5+ articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1091.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mahmoud:** Connect Tyler with the Clear Street marketing and growth teams.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Tyler:** Schedule a follow-up call with the marketing team for a platform demo.](https://fathom.video/share/wQVXUhGpK2QKrC23UJEBwx36oXR3Bnix?tab=summary&timestamp=1168.0)
